Name: ESTUS_FLASK_LV_DATA_PARAM
Description: Defines Estus Flask upgrade level behavior, including the applied special effect and number of uses granted.

Fields.Name: Special Effect ID
Fields.Description: References the SpEffect applied when the Estus Flask is used at this upgrade level. Controls healing amount and any additional effects.

Fields.Name: Use Count
Fields.Description: Number of times the flask can be used at this upgrade level before needing to rest or refill.
